arts.ttl: Arsenal face struggle to seal transfer of “key player” who is performing “very well” for Euro giants
arts.sum: Arsenal could struggle to seal the transfer of Inter Milan defender Yann Bisseck as Fabrizio Romano has played down the recent links. The Gunners have been reported to have an interest in Bisseck via a report from Inter Live, who have stated that a €25million bid could be a possibility for this January due to […] The post Arsenal face struggle to seal transfer of “key player” who is performing “very well” for Euro giants appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Young Arsenal midfielder with 'excellent technical ability' travels to Atalanta in wake of Martin Odegaard injury blow
arts.sum: Arsenal are gearing up their Champions League opener against Atalanta, which takes place on Thursday in wake of the competition’s rebranding. However, Arsenal will have...

The first of our eight matches, all against different opponents, comes against the reigning Europa League holders who knocked out Sporting Lisbon, Liverpool and Marseille before stunning Bayer Leverkusen in the final courtesy of an Ademola Lookman hat-trick, and Gian Piero Gasperini’s side will be hoping to make their mark in Europe again. Courtesy of their Europa League success last term and a fourth-place finish in Serie A, Atalanta have secured their first Champions League berth since 2021/22, but this campaign so far has been a mixed bag with two wins and two losses from their opening four league games.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola offers Kevin De Bruyne injury update as Man City star could miss Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Manchester City star Kevin De Bruyne was forced off during his team'S Champions League meeting with Inter Milan, leaving his participation against Arsenal up in the air

arts.ttl: Man City's Pep Guardiola gives blunt one-word answer to Arsenal question
arts.sum: Speaking to TNT Sports before his star-studded squad's match against the Italian giants at the Etihad Stadium on Wednesday night, he was asked how much of the game with Mikel Arteta's side played into his starting XI for the Inter fixture. Pep Guardiola did not give much away when asked if his team selection for the UEFA Champions League opener against Inter Milan was influenced by Sunday's impending fixture against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Thursday's Champions League predictions including Atalanta BC vs. Arsenal
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Champions League fixtures, including Atalanta BC vs. Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's predicted line-up vs Atalanta as Mikel Arteta faces Bukayo Saka headache
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta may be tempted to rest star players for tonight's Champions League opener with big test to come away to Manchester City on Sunday afternoon but injuries mean fringe stars must start regardless

arts.ttl: £27m Arsenal ace has just done something Mesut Ozil would be proud of as training footage emerges
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard was spotted pulling off a Mesut Ozil skill in training ahead of Arsenal vs Atalanta.

arts.sum: European campaign begins for Gunners with tough test

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as three miss Atalanta with worrying Martin Odegaard update
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has finally provided an update on the severity of Martin Odegaard's injury after the Gunners skipper missed Sunday's North London derby with over Tottenham. The midfielder is yet to play for Arsenal after suffering a shoulder fracture in his first training session following his move from Real Sociedad.
